title: タイキシャトルからの提案

text_block_list.text:
We've been gathering members, and the team is
really starting to take shape. One day...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy, Trainer! I've got the world's best
suggestion, and I hope you like it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I used my noggin to think of the best way to
power up our ol' team!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
To give ourselves a team name! We gotta come
up with a cheerful-soundin' name that anyone'll
love!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I don't got any ideas right now, but I'll let ya
know as soon as I do!
Taiki Shuttle dashes off as quickly as she came...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I thought up a name! I think this one'll really
represent how fun and friendly we are!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We should call ourselves... "Happy Hoppers"!
Hehe. Not bad, right?

That might be a good team name! I'll have to
make note of it.
